sections.paragraph:
ἀντικνήμιον, ου, τό (ἀντί, κνήμη [‘leg’] + suffix -ιον; Hipponax [VI b.c.] 49; Aristoph., Hippocr., X. et al.; oft. pap) shin MPol 8:3.—DELG s.v. κνήμη.

Hipponax Hipponax , VI b.c.—List 5

Aristoph Aristoph , V–IV b.c.—List 5

Hippocr Hippocr = Corpus Hippocraticum, V–IV b.c.—List 5

  1. X. = Xenophon, V–IV b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

oft. oft. = often

pap pap = papyrus, -yri

MPol MPol = Martyrdom of Polycarp; after II a.d.—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 89
